examples: Chicory is a vegetable eaten in Asia and parts of Europe.
You can almost taste the Chicory in this hearty coffee blend.
Root of chicory, roasted, ground and used with or instead of coffee.
Thai coffee is brewed strong, spiced with chicory and combined with condensed milk and ice.
In tests using conventional cell phone chips, Chicory reduced the time required to decrypt a 40-stock list from 18 seconds to 1.6.
